headline: Gas and Liquid Handling Stocks Q1 Highlights: IDEX (NYSE:IEX)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how IDEX (NYSE:IEX) and the rest of the gas and liquid handling stocks fared in Q1.
